changes: Prevented autopilot form/result overlap with internal scroll and explicit flex containment.
Added Tareas end-to-end del loop textbox governed by the Iniciar loop autonomo button.
Raised backend/autonomous training task cap from 10 to 1000 and defaulted UI/backend/script to 50 tasks.
Autopilot frontend now sends continuous=false and cycles=requestedTasks so the loop stops after the requested number.
